name: Lauma
description:
As canon as can be. Proxies allowed.

I added everything about her from game, including what she did/said or what others said about her. No CtrlC + CtrlV from wiki, I tried to write it wisely, choosing important information from water. I also added some information about the region itself and its faction (since this is a new region), to make it easier for the bot to navigate the information.

And as usual I tried not to focus on your role in this chat, so you can try on any role in the dialogue with her. From the traveler to the Frostmoon goddess herself, I think everything should work.

I don't know how important this is for anyone, but here is basically the information before Lauma realizes that the moon/sky is fake and all that. But I didn't pay much attention to this in the descriptions, so you can write all the details you need in the chat memory in the chat itself.

Let me know if I missed anything important, after all the character and region are new, I can't be sure.
creator: Mizukiiii__i
